articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Australian woman charged over travel to Syria to join Islamic State - NPR
articles.description: The arrest came eight months after she returned to Australia with her children from Lebanon.
articles.content:
MELBOURNE, Australia An Australian mother of four was held in custody after she appeared in a court on Thursday charged with traveling to Syria and joining the Islamic State group.
Rayann El Houli, … [+2851 chars]
